{{Short description|National association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Kyrgyzstan women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=June 2022}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = Kyrgyz Republic
| Badge                 = Flag of Kyrgyzstan.svg
| Nickname              = {{lang|ky|Ак шумкарлар}}<br>(The White [[Falcon]]s)
| Association           = [[Kyrgyz Football Union]] (KFU)
| Confederation         = [[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]] (Asia)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Central Asian Football Association|CAFA]] (Central Asia)
| Coach                 = [[Robert Prosinečki]]
| Captain               = [[Valery Kichin]]
| Most caps             = [[Kayrat Zhyrgalbek uulu]] (84)
| Top scorer            = [[Mirlan Murzayev]] (16)
| Home Stadium          = [[Dolen Omurzakov Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = KGZ
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|KGZ}}
| FIFA max              = 75
| FIFA max date         = April-May 2018
| FIFA min              = 201
| FIFA min date         = March 2013
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Kyrgyzstan}}
| Elo max               = 136
| Elo max date          = January 2019
| Elo min               = 178
| Elo min date          = February 2013
| pattern_la1           = _yellowborder
| pattern_b1            = _kgz24h
| pattern_ra1           = _yellowborder
| leftarm1              = FF0000
| body1                 = FF0000
| rightarm1             = FF0000
| shorts1               = FF0000
| socks1                = FF0000
| pattern_la2           = _kgz24a
| pattern_b2            = _kgz24a
| pattern_ra2           = _kgz24a
| leftarm2              = FFFFFF
| body2                 = FFFFFF
| rightarm2             = FFFFFF
| shorts2               = FFFFFF
| socks2                = FFFFFF
| First game            = {{fb|UZB}} 3–0 {{fb-rt|KGZ|1992}}<br>([[Tashkent]], Uzbekistan; 23 August 1992)<ref name="RSSSF">{{cite web|last=Hyung-Jin|first=Yoon|title=Kyrgyzstan International Matches|url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesk/kyrg-intres.html|access-date=19 November 2010|website=[[RSSSF]]|date=30 April 2006|archive-date=22 December 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20221222041747/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesk/kyrg-intres.html|url-status=live}}</ref>
| Largest win           = {{fb|KGZ|1992}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|MYA}}<br>([[Bishkek]], Kyrgyzstan; 10 October 2019)<br>{{fb|MYA}} 1–8 {{fb-rt|KGZ|1992}}<br>([[Osaka]], Japan; 11 June 2021)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|IRN}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|KGZ|1992}}<br>([[Damascus]], Syria; 4 June 1997)
| Regional name         = [[AFC Asian Cup|Asian Cup]]
| Regional cup apps     = 3
| Regional cup first    = [[2019 AFC Asian Cup|2019]]
| Regional cup best     = Round of 16 ([[2019 AFC Asian Cup|2019]])
| 2ndRegional name      = [[CAFA Nations Cup]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 2
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[2023 CAFA Nations Cup|2023]]
| 2ndRegional cup best  = Fourth place ([[2023 CAFA Nations Cup|2023]])
| 3rdRegional name      = [[WAFF Championship]]
| 3rdRegional cup apps  = 1
| 3rdRegional cup first = [[2000 WAFF Championship|2000]]
| 3rdRegional cup best  = Group stage ([[2000 WAFF Championship|2000]])
| 4thRegional name      = [[AFC Challenge Cup]]
| 4thRegional cup apps  = 3
| 4thRegional cup first = [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]]
| 4thRegional cup best  = Third place ([[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]])
}}

The '''Kyrgyzstan national football team''' ({{langx|ky|Кыргыз Республикасынын улуттук курама командасы}}; {{langx|ru|Сборная Кыргызской Республики по футболу}}), officially recognised by [[FIFA]] and [[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]] as '''Kyrgyz Republic''', represents [[Kyrgyzstan]] in international [[association football|football]] and is controlled by the [[Kyrgyz Football Union]], a member of the [[Asian Football Confederation]] (AFC) and [[Central Asian Football Association]].<ref>{{Cite web |last=Clément |first=Clerc-Dubois |date=2021-04-19 |title=A hundred years of Kyrgyz football |url=https://novastan.org/en/kyrgyzstan/a-hundred-years-of-kyrgyz-football/ |access-date=2026-05-28 |website=Novastan English}}</ref>

==History==

===Early years===

Until the [[collapse of the Soviet Union]] in 1991, Kyrgyz football players played for the [[USSR national football team]]. After Kyrgyzstan gained independence on August 31, 1991, the national team was created. Kyrgyzstan played its first match on August 23, 1992, in the {{interlanguage link|Central Asian Cup|ru|Кубок Центральной Азии по футболу 1992}} against Uzbekistan in [[Tashkent]]. The match ended in a 3-0 victory for Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan eventually finished in fourth place. The team was scheduled to play against [[Turkmenistan national football team|Turkmenistan]] on July 16, 1992, but the match was cancelled due to the absence of the Turkmenistan team. In 1993, Kyrgyzstan participated in the [[1993 ECO Cup]] in Iran, but failed to advance past the group stage.

In 1994, the Football Federation of Kyrgyzstan was admitted as a full member of the [[Asian Football Confederation]] (AFC) and [[FIFA]]. The team participated in the Uzbekistan Independence Cup, finishing in last place. The team did not play any matches in 1995, and in 1996, they participated in the [[1996 AFC Asian Cup qualification]], finishing in second place in their group and failing to advance. In 1997, Kyrgyzstan participated in [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification – AFC first round|1998 FIFA World Cup qualification]], but was eliminated in the first round after finishing second in their group.

In 1999, Kyrgyzstan played in [[2000 AFC Asian Cup qualification]], but finished in last place in their group. The team participated in the [[2000 WAFF Championship]], but again finished in last place. In 2001, Kyrgyzstan participated in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (AFC)|2002 FIFA World Cup qualification]], but was eliminated in the first round after finishing third in their group.

In 2002, the team did not play any matches, and in 2003, they participated in the [[2004 AFC Asian Cup qualification]], finishing in second place in their group and failing to advance. That same year, they also participated in the first round of the qualifying tournament for the 2006 World Cup, advancing to the next round after defeating Pakistan in both matches. In 2004, Kyrgyzstan participated in the second stage of the [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification (AFC)|2006 FIFA World Cup qualification]], but finished in fourth place in their group.

===AFC Asian Cup debut===

[[File:KGZ-PHI 2019-01-16.svg|thumb|150px|Kyrgyzstan starting line-up against [[Philippines national football team|Philippines]] at the [[2019 AFC Asian Cup]] Group C match, gaining their first ever win in their history in the tournament]]

[[File:Valery Kichin 2022.jpg|thumb|150px|[[Valery Kichin]] captained Kyrgyzstan at the 2019 AFC Asian Cup]]

In the years since, Kyrgyzstan has seen some success, participating in the 2010, 2014, and 2018 editions of the AFC Challenge Cup, finishing in third place in 2010 and as runners-up in 2014 . During the third round of the [[2019 AFC Asian Cup qualification – third round|2019 AFC Asian Cup qualification]], Kyrgyzstan was grouped with [[India men's national football team|India]], [[Myanmar national football team|Myanmar]] and [[Macau national football team|Macau]] in which they got 4 wins, 1 draw and 1 lost seeing Kyrgyzstan qualified to their first-ever major tournament in the [[2019 AFC Asian Cup|2019 edition]] of the [[AFC Asian Cup]].<ref>{{Cite web |title=Come on referee, you weren't supposed to see this! |url=https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/articles/how-kyrgyz-republic-cracked-the-consistency-code |access-date=2024-04-20 |website=www.fifa.com}}</ref> In the 2019 AFC Asian Cup, Kyrgyzstan was drawn in Group C alongside [[China national football team|China]], [[Philippines national football team|Philippines]] and heavyweights [[South Korea national football team|South Korea]]. The team lost back to back to China and South Korea needing a desperate win against the Philippines in the last match to at least qualified to the knockout stage which [[Vitalij Lux]] scored a hat-trick gaining Kyrgyzstan their first ever win in their history of the tournament seeing them through to the Round of 16 facing [[United Arab Emirates national football team|United Arab Emirates]]. Throughout the match, UAE was leading at 2–1 where in the 90' minute stoppage time, [[Tursunali Rustamov]] scored a header from a corner kick to equalised the match at 2–2 sending it into extra time however their luck ran out as [[Ahmed Khalil (footballer, born 1991)|Ahmed Khalil]] scored a penalty seeing Kyrgyzstan out from the tournament. In the same year, Kyrgyzstan reached their highest-ever FIFA ranking of 75th.

In the [[2023 AFC Asian Cup qualification – third round|2023 Asian Cup qualification]], Kyrgyzstan hosted all of the Group F matches being grouped with neighbours, Tajikistan and two Southeast Asia countries, [[Myanmar national football team|Myanmar]] and [[Singapore national football team|Singapore]]. In the first match, the team bounced back from 1–0 down as [[Valery Kichin]] converted a penalty to level the score in the 77' minute in which [[Viktor Maier]] scored the winner in the 82' minute to secure the three points for Kyrgyzstan. In the next fixture, Viktor Maier scored a brace against Myanmar securing another three points for Kyrgyzstan before facing Tajikistan in a goalless draw in the final fixture seeing both team advancing to the [[2023 AFC Asian Cup]] in Qatar.

In 2023, Kyrgyzstan alongside Uzbekistan hosted the inaugural [[2023 CAFA Nations Cup]].

==Stadium==

Home matches are played at the [[Dolen Omurzakov Stadium]] in [[Bishkek]], which has a capacity of 23,000. A new 51,000-seat stadium, the [[Azattyk Arena]], is currently under construction and expected in open in August 2026.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://sport.kg/thefootball/84802-novyj-stadion-v-bishkeke-planiruetsja-otkryt-31-avgusta-2026-goda.html|title=Новый стадион в Бишкеке планируется открыть 31 августа 2026 года|website=Ежедневная спортивная газета Кыргызстана Sport.kg}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://kaktus.media/doc/499789_novyy_stadion_v_sele_orok_proektiryut_injenery_i_arhitektory_iz_tyrcii_i_velikobritanii.html|title=Новый стадион в селе Орок проектируют инженеры и архитекторы из Турции и Великобритании|date=April 20, 2024|website=kaktus.media}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://kaktus.media/doc/509300_kak_idet_stroitelstvo_novogo_stadiona_bliz_bishkeka_video.html|title=Как идет строительство нового стадиона близ Бишкека? (видео)|date=September 15, 2024|website=kaktus.media}}</ref>

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|Kyrgyzstan national football team results (2020–present)|Kyrgyzstan national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

=== 2025 ===
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – AFC third round#Group A|2026 WCQ - 3rd round]]
|date       = 5 June
|time       = {{UTZ|21:15|3}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|PRK}}
|score      = 2–2
|team2      = {{fb|KGZ}}
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/520/288263/288276/400018443
|goals1     =
*[[Pak Kwang-hun]] {{goal|44}}
*[[Ri Jo-guk]] {{goal|52}}
|goals2     =
*[[Gulzhigit Alykulov|Alykulov]] {{goal|57}}
*[[Kim Sung-hye]] {{goal|90+5|o.g.}}
|location   = [[Riyadh]], Saudi Arabia
|stadium    = [[Prince Faisal bin Fahd Sports City Stadium]]
|attendance = 100
|referee    = [[Adham Makhadmeh]] ([[Jordan Football Association|Jordan]])
|result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 10 June
|time       = {{UTZ|19:45|6}}
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – AFC third round#Group A|2026 WCQ - 3rd round]]
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = 1–1
|report     = https://www.the-afc.com/en/matches/asian-qualifiers/2026/2453076
|team2      = {{fb|UAE}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Kai Merk|Merk]] {{goal|90+5}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Harib Abdalla|Abdalla]] {{goal|30}}
|stadium    = [[Dolen Omurzakov Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bishkek]], Kyrgyzstan 
|attendance = 12,258
|referee    = Ahmed Al-Ali ([[Kuwait Football Association|Kuwait]])
|result     = D
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 30 August
|round      = [[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = 1–1
|report     = [https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-08-30/kyrgyz-republic-vs-turkmenistan/3873376/ {{nowrap|GSA Report}}]
|team2      = {{fb|TKM}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Joel Kojo|Kojo]] {{goal|45}}
|goals2     =
*[[Wepa Jumaýew|Jumaýew]] {{goal|44}}
|location   = [[Tashkent]], Uzbekistan
|stadium    = [[JAR Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Sajëçon Zajniddinov ([[Tajikistan Football Federation|Tajikistan]])
|result     = D
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]
|date       = 2 September
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|OMA}}
|score      = 2–1
|report     = [https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-09-02/oman-vs-kyrgyz-republic/3873377/ {{nowrap|GSA Report}}] 
|team2      = {{fb|KGZ}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Issam Al-Sabhi|Al Sabhi]] {{goal|90+1||90+5}} 
|goals2     = 
*[[Tamirlan Kozubayev|Kozubayev]] {{goal|24}}
|location   = [[Tashkent]], Uzbekistan
|stadium    = [[JAR Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Hasan Akrami ([[Football Federation Islamic Republic of Iran|Iran]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]
|date       = 5 September
|time       = {{UTZ|19:30|5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|UZB}}
|score      = 4–0
|report     = [https://globalsportsarchive.com/match/soccer/2025-09-05/uzbekistan-vs-kyrgyz-republic/3873379/ {{nowrap|GSA Report}}]
|team2      = {{fb|KGZ}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Akmal Mozgovoy|Mozgovoy]] {{goal|20}}
*[[Otabek Shukurov|Shukurov]] {{goal|67|pen.}}
*[[Igor Sergeev|Sergeev]] {{goal|82}}
*[[Azizbek Turgunboev|Turgunboev]] {{goal|90+3}}
|goals2     = 
|location   = [[Tashkent]], Uzbekistan
|stadium    = [[Olympic City Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Sadullo Gulmurodi ([[Tajikistan Football Federation|Tajikistan]])
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
|date       = 25 March
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|3}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = 0–1
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-25/equatorial-guinea-vs-kyrgyz-republic/4134520
|team2      = {{fb|EQG}}
|goals1     =
|goals2     = 
*[[Josete Miranda|Josete]] {{goal|40|pen.}} 
|stadium    = [[Arslan Zeki Demirci Sports Complex|Emirhan Sport Complex]]
|location   = [[Antalya]], Türkiye
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Cihan Aydın]] ([[Turkish Football Federation|Turkey]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition game|Friendly]]
|date       = 28 March
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = 2–5
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-28/kyrgyz-republic-vs-madagascar/4130506
|team2      = {{fb|MAD}}
|goals1     = 
*[[Beknaz Almazbekov|Almazbekov]] {{goal|58|pen.}}
*[[Bektur Köçkönbaev|Köçkönbaev]] {{goal|62}}
|goals2     = 
*[[Arnaud Randrianantenaina|Randrianantenaina]] {{goal|5}}
*[[Thomas Fontaine|Fontaine]] {{goal|17}}
*[[Warren Caddy|Caddy]] {{goal|24||79|pen.}}
*[[Clément Couturier|Couturier]] {{goal|42}}
|stadium    = Calista Sports Center 
|location   = [[Belek]], Türkiye
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Kadir Sağlam]] ([[Turkish Football Federation|Turkey]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date       = 30 March
|time       = {{UTZ||3}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = Cancelled
|team2      = {{fb|BHR}}
|goals1      =
|goals2      =
|stadium    = 
|location   = [[Antalya]], Türkiye
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = v
|report     = 
|note       = Match cancelled due to travel disruptions from the [[2026 Iran war]].
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 6 June
|time       = {{UTZ|20:30|6}}
|round      = [[Exhibition match#International football|Friendly]]
|team1      = {{fb-rt|PSE}}
|score      = 0–0
|report     =
|team2      = {{fb|KGZ}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Dolen Omurzakov Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bishkek]], Kyrgyzstan 
|attendance = 
|referee    =
|result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 9 June
|time       = {{UTZ|20:30|6}}
|round      = [[Exhibition match#International football|Friendly]]
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|score      = 0–0
|report     =
|team2      = {{fb|PLE}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Dolen Omurzakov Stadium]]
|location   = [[Bishkek]], Kyrgyzstan 
|attendance = 
|referee    =
|result     = D
}}

===2027===
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 9 January
|time       = {{UTZ|--:--|}}
|round      = [[2027 AFC Asian Cup Group C|2027 Asian Cup GS]]
|score      = 
|report     = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SYR}}
|goals1     =
|team2      = {{fb|KGZ}}
|goals2     =
|stadium    = [[King Fahd Sports City Stadium]] 
|location   = [[Riyadh]], Saudi Arabia
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = 
}} 
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 13 January
|time       = {{UTZ|--:--|}}
|round      = [[2027 AFC Asian Cup Group C|2027 Asian Cup GS]]
|score      = 
|report     = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|goals1     =
|team2      = {{fb|IRN}}
|goals2     =
|stadium    = [[Al-Shabab Club Stadium|Al Shabab Stadium]] 
|location   = [[Riyadh]], Saudi Arabia
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = 
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|date       = 18 January
|time       = {{UTZ|--:--|}}
|round      = [[2027 AFC Asian Cup Group C|2027 Asian Cup GS]]
|score      = 
|report     = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KGZ}}
|goals1     =
|team2      = {{fb|CHN}}
|goals2     =
|stadium    = [[Kingdom Arena]] 
|location   = [[Riyadh]], Saudi Arabia
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = 
}}

== Coaching staff ==
{{updated|10 December 2025.}}<ref>{{cite web|script-title=ru:Национальная сборная|url=http://ffkr.kg/trenerskij-shtab-nacionalnoj-sbornoj-v-licax/|publisher=[[Football Federation of the Kyrgyz Republic]]|access-date=6 January 2019|language=ru|date=6 January 2019|archive-date=9 January 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190109020655/http://ffkr.kg/trenerskij-shtab-nacionalnoj-sbornoj-v-licax/|url-status=dead}}</ref>
{| class="wikitable sortable"
!style="color:#FFFFFF;background:#FF0000|Position
!style="color:#FFFFFF;background:#FF0000|Name
|-
| Head coach
| {{flagicon|CRO}} [[Robert Prosinečki]] 
|-
| Assistant coach
| {{flagicon|CRO}} [[Gordan Ciprić]]
|-
| Goalkeeping coach
| {{flagicon|Montenegro}} [[Boban Bajković]]
|-
| Fitness coach
| 
|-
| Executive director
| 
|-
| Administrator
|
|-
| Medical
| 
|}

=== Coaching history ===
{{updated|match played September 2025}}
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center"
|-
!rowspan=2|Manager
!rowspan=2|From
!rowspan=2|To
!colspan=5|Record
|-
!G!!W!!D!!L!!Win %
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Meklis Koshaliyev]]
|align=left|August 1992
|align=left|February 1996
{{WDL|15|1|3|11}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Yevgeniy Novikov]]
|align=left|June 1997
|align=left|February 2001
{{WDL|19|4|1|14}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Nematjan Zakirov]]
|align=left|March 2003
|align=left|March 2006
{{WDL|12|4|2|6}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Boris Podkorytov]]
|align=left|March 2006
|align=left|December 2006
{{WDL|6|3|0|3}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Nematjan Zakirov]]
|align=left|January 2007
|align=left|December 2008
{{WDL|12|4|0|8}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Anarbek Ormonbekov]]
|align=left|January 2009
|align=left|May 2011
{{WDL|13|3|3|7}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Murat Jumakeev]]
|align=left|May 2011
|align=left|September 2012
{{WDL|3|0|0|3}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|RUS}} [[Sergey Dvoryankov]]
|align=left|September 2012
|align=left|May 2014
{{WDL|6|3|1|2}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ|1992}} [[Mirlan Eshenov]] (caretaker)
|align=left|May 2014
|align=left|October 2014
{{WDL|3|0|0|3}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|RUS}} [[Aleksandr Krestinin]]
|align=left|October 2014
|align=left|3 April 2023<ref>{{cite web |title=ЧОҢ РАХМАТ, АЛЕКСАНДР СЕРГЕЕВИЧ!  |url=https://twitter.com/kfu_kg/status/1642882118052085762 |website=twitter.com/kfu_kg |publisher=Kyrgyz Football Union Twitter |access-date=24 April 2023 |language=Russian |date=3 April 2023}}</ref>
{{WDL|61|27|10|24}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|SVK}} [[Štefan Tarkovič]]
|align=left|24 April 2023<ref>{{cite web |title=ШТЕФАН ТАРКОВИЧ - НОВЫЙ ГЛАВНЫЙ ТРЕНЕР НАЦИОНАЛЬНОЙ СБОРНОЙ КЫРГЫЗСТАНА |url=https://twitter.com/kfu_kg/status/1650472011213225988 |website=twitter.com/kfu_kg |publisher=Kyrgyz Football Union Twitter |access-date=24 April 2023 |language=Russian |date=24 April 2023}}</ref>
|align=left|12 June 2024
{{WDL|19|6|4|9}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|RUS}} [[:ru:Лисицын, Максим Павлович|Maksim Lisitsyn]]
|align=left|13 June 2024
|align=left|27 June 2025
{{WDL|10|2|2|6}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|KGZ}} [[:ru:Абдукаимов, Урмат|Urmat Abdukaimov]] (caretaker)
|align=left|27 June 2025
|align=left|10 December 2025
{{WDL|3|0|1|2}}
|-
|align=left|{{flagicon|CRO}} [[Robert Prosinečki]]
|align=left|10 December 2025
|align=left|
{{WDL|0|0|0|0}}
|-
!colspan=3|Total
{{WDLtot|182|57|27|98}}
|}

== Players ==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[Exhibition game#International football|friendly]] matches against [[Palestine national football team|Palestine]] on 6 and 9 June 2026, respectively.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.facebook.com/KyrgyzFootballUnion/posts/-%D1%83%D0%BB%D1%83%D1%82%D1%82%D1%83%D0%BA-%D0%BA%D1%83%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%BC%D0%B0%D0%BD%D1%8B%D0%BD-%D1%82%D0%B8%D0%B7%D0%BC%D0%B5%D1%81%D0%B8-%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%B5%D1%80%D1%82-%D0%BF%D1%80%D0%BE%D1%81%D0%B8%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%87%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%BD-%D0%B6%D0%B5%D1%82%D0%B5%D0%BA%D1%87%D0%B8%D0%BB%D0%B8%D0%B3%D0%B8-%D0%B0%D0%BB%D0%B4%D1%8B%D0%BD%D0%B4%D0%B0%D0%B3%D1%8B-%D1%83%D0%BB%D1%83%D1%82%D1%82%D1%83%D0%BA-%D0%BA%D1%83/1460250182812034/|title=УЛУТТУК КУРАМАНЫН ТИЗМЕСИ|publisher=[[Kyrgyz Football Union]]|date=25 May 2026|access-date=30 May 2026|language=ru|via=[[Facebook]]}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 6 June 2026, after the match against [[Palestine national football team|Palestine]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Erzhan Tokotayev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|7|17|df=y}}|caps=41|goals=0|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kurmanbek Nurlanbekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|4|1|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Dordoi Bishkek|Dordoi Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Artem Pryadkin]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|9|18|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[FC Bishkek City|Bishkek City]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tamirlan Kozubaev]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|7|1|df=y}}|caps=69|goals=3|club=[[Persita Tangerang]]|clubnat=IDN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ermek Kenzhebayev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|4|3|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Said Datsiev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|4|10|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Arslan Bekberdinov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|8|27|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ulanbek Sulaymanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|10|8|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[FC Ozgon|Ozgon]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Valeriy Murzakov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|9|2|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Talant|Talant]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kayrat Zhyrgalbek uulu]]|age={{Birth date and age|1993|6|13|df=y}}|caps=85|goals=4|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Odilzhon Abdurakhmanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|3|18|df=y}}|caps=55|goals=3|club=[[Dong A Thanh Hoa]]|clubnat=VIE}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Gulzhigit Alykulov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|11|25|df=y}}|caps=50|goals=6|club=[[FC Dinamo Minsk|Dinamo Minsk]]|clubnat=BLR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Alimardon Shukurov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|9|28|df=y}}|caps=36|goals=6|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Murolimzhon Akhmedov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1992|1|5|df=y}}|caps=26|goals=0|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Erbol Atabaev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|8|15|df=y}}|caps=24|goals=0|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Beknaz Almazbekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|6|23|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=0|club=[[FC Rukh Lviv|Rukh Lviv]]|clubnat=UKR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Eldiyar Zarypbekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|9|14|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[FC Chernomorets Novorossiysk|Chernomorets Novorossiysk]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kimi Merk]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|7|6|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Magomed Uzdenov]]|age={{bda|1994|2|25|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Adil Kadyrzhanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|7|14|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[FC Dordoi Bishkek|Dordoi Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Nurdoolot Stalbekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|9|13|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[FC Isloch Minsk Raion|Isloch Minsk Raion]]|clubnat=BLR}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Amir Zhaparov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|2|25|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Bektur Kochkonbaev]]|age={{bda|2003|1|11|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Ozgon|Ozgon]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ernist Batyrkanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|2|21|df=y}}|caps=36|goals=3|club=[[FC Dordoi Bishkek|Dordoi Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kai Merk]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|8|28|df=y}}|caps=29|goals=3|club=[[FC Alga Bishkek|Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Gulzhigit Borubaev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|4|22|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[FC Neman Grodno|Neman Grodno]]|clubnat=BLR}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Sultan Chomoev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|1|20|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Abdysh-Ata Kant|Abdysh-Ata Kant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ruslan Amirov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1990|10|14|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=8|pos=DF|name=[[Valery Kichin]]|age={{Birth date and age|1992|10|12|df=y}}|caps=61|goals=6|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=6|pos=DF|name=[[Khristiyan Brauzman]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|8|15|df=y}}|caps=30|goals=2|club=[[FC Abdysh-Ata Kant|Abdysh-Ata Kant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Amantur Shamurzaev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|1|25|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[FC Abdysh-Ata Kant|Abdysh-Ata Kant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=2|pos=DF|name=[[Esenbek Uson uulu]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|6|29|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[FC Neftchi Kochkor-Ata|Neftchi Kochkor-Ata]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=14|pos=DF|name=[[Aleksandr Mishchenko]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|7|30|df=y}}|caps=25|goals=0|club=[[FC Dordoi Bishkek|Dordoi Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Azim Azarov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|9|20|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[FC Abdysh-Ata Kant|Abdysh-Ata Kant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Arsen Sharshenbekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|3|16|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[FC Talas|Talas]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Anton Polev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|6|9|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[FC Talant|Talant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Atay Dzhumashev]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|9|15|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=Nurlanbek Sarykbaev|age={{Birth date and age|2000|3|18|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[FC Abdysh-Ata Kant|Abdysh-Ata Kant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Islam Yunusov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|1|26|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=[[2025 CAFA Nations Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Baybol Ermekov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|9|8|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Alga Bishkek]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|UAE}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Argen Zhumataev]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|10|21|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[FC Bars Issyk-Kul|Bars Issyk-Kul]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|UAE}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Joel Kojo]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|8|21|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=10|club=[[Esteghlal F.C.|Esteghlal]]|clubnat=IRN|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Arlen Beksulov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|8|17|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Talant|Talant]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Maksat Alygulov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|4|25|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[FC Muras United|Muras United]]|clubnat=KGZ|latest=v. {{fb|MAD}}, 28 March 2026}}
{{nat fs break}}
;Notes
<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad standby.<br>
{{nat fs end}}

== Player records ==
{{updated|6 June 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Kyrgyzstan |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/100/Kyrgyzstan.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Kyrgyzstan.''

===Most appearances===
{{CSS image crop
|Image = Kairat Zhyrgalbek Uulu 20191601.jpg
|bSize = 300
|cWidth = 200
|cHeight = 
|oTop = 
|oLeft = 50
|Location = right
|Description = Kayrat Zhyrgalbek uulu is Kyrgyzstan's most capped player with 83 appearances.
}}

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|align="left"|'''[[Kayrat Zhyrgalbek uulu]]'''
|85
|4
|2013–present
|-
|2
|align="left"|'''[[Tamirlan Kozubayev]]'''
|69
|3
|2015–present
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|align="left"|'''[[Valery Kichin]]'''
|61
|6
|2011–present 
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Farhat Musabekov]]'''
|61
|2
|2015–present
|-
|5
|align="left"|[[Mirlan Murzayev]]
|60
|16
|2009–2023
|-
|6
|align="left"|'''[[Odilzhon Abdurakhmanov]]'''
|55
|3
|2016–present
|-
|7
|align="left"|[[Vadim Kharchenko]]
|53
|3
|2003–2015
|-
|8
|align="left"|'''[[Gulzhigit Alykulov]]'''
|50
|6
|2019–present
|-
|9 
|align="left"|'''[[Bakhtiyar Duyshobekov]]'''
|48
|3
|2015–present
|-
|10
|align="left"| [[Pavel Matyash]]
|46
|0
|2009–2021
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===
{{CSS image crop
|Image = Mirlan Murzaev 20191601.jpg
|bSize = 300
|cWidth = 200
|cHeight = 
|oTop = 
|oLeft = 50
|Location = right
|Description = Mirlan Murzayev is Kyrgyzstan's top scorer with 16 goals.
}}
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="font-size:100%; text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!width=175px|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Average
!width=100px|Period
|-
|1 
|align="left"|[[Mirlan Murzayev]]
|16
|60
|{{#expr:16/60 round 2}}
|2009–2023
|-
|2 
|align="left"|[[Anton Zemlianukhin]]
|13
|33
|{{#expr:13/33 round 2}}
|2007–2023
|-
|3
|align="left"|'''[[Joel Kojo]]'''
|11
|30
|{{#expr:11/30 round 2}}
|2023–present
|- 
|4 
|align="left"|[[Vitalij Lux]]
|8
|32
|{{#expr:8/32 round 2}}
|2015–2019
|-
|5
|align="left"|'''[[Alimardon Shukurov]]'''
|7
|38
|{{#expr:7/38 round 2}}
|2017–present
|-
|rowspan=3|6
|align="left"|[[Tursunali Rustamov]]
|6
|32
|{{#expr:6/32 round 2}}
|2012–2023
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Gulzhigit Alykulov]]'''
|6
|50
|{{#expr:6/50 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Valery Kichin]]'''
|6
|61
|{{#expr:6/61 round 2}}
|2011–present
|-
|9
|align="left"|[[Edgar Bernhardt]]
|5
|41
|{{#expr:5/41 round 2}}
|2014–2021
|-
|rowspan="6"|10
|align="left"|[[Viktor Maier]]
|4
|24
|{{#expr:4/24 round 2}}
|2015–2023
|-
|align="left"|[[Akhlidin Israilov]]
|4
|34
|{{#expr:4/34 round 2}}
|2013–2022
|-
|align="left"|[[Azamat Baymatov]]
|4
|36
|{{#expr:4/36 round 2}}
|2010–2019
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Bekzhan Sagynbaev]]'''
|4
|41
|{{#expr:4/41 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Kayrat Zhyrgalbek uulu]]'''
|4
|85
|{{#expr:4/85 round 2}}
|2013–present
|-
|}

== Competitive record==
=== FIFA World Cup ===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
! rowspan="15"|
! colspan="6" |[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| {{flagicon|Uruguay}} [[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to  {{flagicon|Italy}} [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]] 
|colspan=8|''Part of {{fb|Soviet Union}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{fb|Soviet Union}}''
|-
| {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=8|''Not a FIFA member''|| colspan="6" |''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=8 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|6||3||0||3||12||14
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|6||1||1||4||3||9
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|8||3||1||4||11||12
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|2||1||0||1||2||2
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|2||0||0||2||0||7
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|8||4||2||2||10||8
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|8||3||1||4||19||12
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|16||5||4||7||25||25
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
| {{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total||–||{{Tooltip|0/7|Number of tournaments qualified for}}||–||–||–||–||–||–
!56||20||9||27||82||89
|}

=== AFC Asian Cup ===
{{Main|Kyrgyzstan at the AFC Asian Cup}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;" width=80%
|-
!colspan=9|[[AFC Asian Cup]] record
! rowspan="13" width="1%" |
!colspan=6|[[AFC Asian Cup qualifiers|Qualification]] record
|-
!width=150|Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Hong Kong|1955}} [[1956 AFC Asian Cup|1956]] to {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[1988 AFC Asian Cup|1988]] ||colspan=8|''Part of {{fb|USSR}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{fb|USSR}}''
|-
| {{flagicon|Japan|1870}} [[1992 AFC Asian Cup|1992]] ||colspan=8|''Not an AFC member''
|colspan=6|''Not an AFC member''
|-
| {{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[1996 AFC Asian Cup|1996]] ||colspan=8 rowspan=3| ''Did not qualify''
|4||1|| rowspan="3" |0||3||3||7
|-
| {{flagicon|Lebanon}} [[2000 AFC Asian Cup|2000]] 
|3||0||3||3||11
|-
| {{flagicon|China}} [[2004 AFC Asian Cup|2004]] 
|2||1||1||3||2
|-
|{{flagicon|Indonesia}} {{flagicon|Malaysia}} {{flagicon|Thailand}} {{flagicon|Vietnam}} [[2007 AFC Asian Cup|2007]] ||colspan=8| ''Did not enter''
|colspan=6| ''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2011 AFC Asian Cup|2011]] ||colspan=8 rowspan=2| ''Did not qualify''
|colspan=6|{{small|''[[2008 AFC Challenge Cup|2008]] & [[2010 AFC Challenge Cup]]'' }}
|-
| {{flagicon|Australia}} [[2015 AFC Asian Cup|2015]]
|colspan=6|{{small|''[[2012 AFC Challenge Cup|2012]] & [[2014 AFC Challenge Cup]]'' }}
|-
|{{flagicon|United Arab Emirates}} [[2019 AFC Asian Cup|2019]]||Round of 16||15th||4||1||0||3||6||7
|14||8||3||3||26||17
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2023 AFC Asian Cup|2023]]||Group stage||20th||3||0||1||2||1||5
|11||5||2||4||23||13
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2027 AFC Asian Cup|2027]]||colspan="8"|''Qualified''
|6||3||2||1||13||7
|-
!Total||3/9||15th||7 ||1 ||1 ||5 ||7 ||12 ||
!40 ||18 ||7 ||15 ||71 || 57
|}

=== AFC Challenge Cup ===
{{col-begin}}
{{col-2}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;" width=70%
|-
!colspan=8|[[AFC Challenge Cup]] record
!width=1% rowspan=8|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Result
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|-bgcolor=#cc9966
|| {{flagicon|BAN}} [[2006 AFC Challenge Cup|2006]] || '''Third place''' || '''5'''|| '''3''' || '''0''' || '''2''' || '''4''' || '''3'''
|colspan=7|''Invited''
|-bgcolor= 
|| {{flagicon|IND}} [[2008 AFC Challenge Cup|2008]]||colspan=7| ''Did not qualify''
|2||1||0||1||2||2
|-
|| {{flagicon|SRI}} [[2010 AFC Challenge Cup|2010]]|| Group stage || 3|| 1|| 0 || 2|| 2 || 6
|2||0||2||0||2||2
|-
|| {{flagicon|NEP}} [[2012 AFC Challenge Cup|2012]]||colspan=7| ''Did not qualify''
|3||1||0||2||5||6
|-
|| {{flagicon|MDV}} [[2014 AFC Challenge Cup|2014]]|| Group stage || 3|| 1|| 0|| 2|| 1|| 3
|3||3||0||0||3||0
|-
! Total || 3/5 || 11|| 5|| 0 || 6|| 7|| 12
!10||5||2||3||12||10
|}
{{col-end}}

===CAFA Nations Cup===
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;font-size:100%;"
|-
!colspan=8|[[CAFA Nations Cup]] record
|-
!width=130|Year
!width=100|Result
!width=35|{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-bgcolor=#9acdff
|style="border:3px solid red;"|{{flagicon|KGZ}}{{flagicon|UZB}} [[2023 CAFA Nations Cup|2023]]||'''Fourth place'''||'''3'''||'''1'''||'''0'''||'''2'''||'''4'''||'''6'''
|-
|{{flagicon|TJK}}{{flagicon|UZB}} [[2025 CAFA Nations Cup|2025]]||Group  stage||3||0||1||2||2||7
|-
!colspan=2|Total|| 6 || 1 || 1 || 4 || 6 || 13
|}

=== West Asian Championship ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;font-size:100%;"
|-
!colspan=8|[[WAFF Championship|West Asian Championship]] record
|-
!width=130|Year
!width=100|Result
!width=35|{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!width=35|{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Jordan}} [[2000 West Asian Football Federation Championship|2000]]||Group stage||3||0||0||3||0||8
|-
!colspan=2|Total|| 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 0 || 8
|}

=== ELF Cup ===
In 2006, Kyrgyzstan took part in the inaugural [[ELF Cup]] in [[Northern Cyprus]]. This competition was originally intended to be for teams that were not members of [[FIFA]]; however, the organisers extended invitations to both Kyrgyzstan and [[Tajikistan national football team|Tajikistan]], who were both represented by their national [[futsal]] teams.

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[ELF Cup|2006]]||'''Semi-finals''' ||{{Bronze3}}||5||2||1||2||11||8
|}

<nowiki>*</nowiki>Draws include knockout matches decided via [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|penalty shoot-out]].

==Head-to-head record==
{{main|Kyrgyzstan national football team results}}
{{updated|9 June 2026.}}<ref>{{cite web|title=Kyrgyzstan National Team Team's statistics (1992–2011)|url=http://ffkr.kg/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=5%3Asbornaja-kyrgyzstana-balans-igr-19922011-na-2232011&catid=3%3Anational-team&Itemid=14&lang=en|website=ffkr.kg|access-date=31 October 2013|archive-date=2 November 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131102023425/http://ffkr.kg/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=5%3Asbornaja-kyrgyzstana-balans-igr-19922011-na-2232011&catid=3%3Anational-team&Itemid=14&lang=en|url-status=live}}</ref>
{| class="sortable wikitable"
|-
! Opponents
! Played
! Won
! Drawn*
! Lost
! GF
! GA
! GD
! % Won
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|AFG}}||5||1||1||3||4||4||0|| {{#expr:1/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|AUS}}||2|| rowspan="3" |0||0||2||1||5||-4|| rowspan="3" | {{#expr:0/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|AZE}}||3||1||2||0||4||-4
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|BHR}}||7||1||6||4||16||-12
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|BAN}}||5||5||0||0||14||3||+11|| {{#expr:5/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|BLR}}||1||0|| rowspan="4" |0||1||1||3||-2|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|CAM}}||2||2||0||8||6||+2|| {{#expr:2/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|CHN}}||2||0||2||1||5||-4|| {{#expr:0/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|TPE}}||2||2||0||7||1||+6|| {{#expr:2/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|EST}}||2||0||1||1||1||2||-1|| {{#expr:0/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|EQG}}||1||0||0||1||0||1||-1|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|IND}}||5||1|| rowspan="5" |0||4||3||9||-6|| {{#expr:1/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|IDN}}||2||1||1||1||4||-3|| {{#expr:1/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|IRN}}||6|| rowspan="3" |0||6||4||25||-21|| rowspan="3" | {{#expr:0/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|IRQ}}||2||2||1||9||-8
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|JPN}}||3||3||1||11||-10
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|JOR}}||6||3||1||2||4||4||0|| {{#expr:3/6 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|KAZ}}||5||0||1||4||3||15||-12|| {{#expr:0/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|KUW}}||5||1||1||3||5||11||-6|| {{#expr:1/5 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|LIB}}||3||0||2||1||1||3||-2|| {{#expr:0/3 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MAC}}||4||4||0||0||8||3||+5|| {{#expr:4/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MAD}}||1||0||0||1||2||5||–3|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MAS}}||3||1||1||1||5||5||0|| {{#expr:1/3 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MDV}}||4||2||0||2||10||4||+6|| {{#expr:2/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MDA}}||1||0||0||1||1||2||-1|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MNG}}||2||1||0||1||2||2||0|| {{#expr:1/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|MYA}}||7||5||2||0||26||5||+21|| {{#expr:5/7 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|NEP}}||2||1||1||0||3||1||+2|| {{#expr:1/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|PRK}}||3||1||1||1||3||6||-3|| {{#expr:0/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|OMA}}||7||1||2||4||4||10||-6|| {{#expr:1/7 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|PAK}}||4||3||0||1||7||1||+6|| {{#expr:3/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|PLE}}||7||2||4||1||6||5||+1|| {{#expr:2/7 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|PHI}}||4||1||0||3||4||5||-1|| {{#expr:1/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|QAT}}||4||1||1||2||4||5||-1|| {{#expr:1/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|RUS}}||1||0||0||1||1||2||-1|| rowspan="2" | {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|KSA}}||3||0||0||3||0||7||-7
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|SIN}}||4||3||1||0||6||3||+3|| {{#expr:3/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|KOR}}||1||0||0||1||0||1||-1|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|SRI}}||1||1||0||0||4||1||+3|| {{#expr:1/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|SYR}}||7||3||2||2||8||10||-2|| {{#expr:3/7 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|TJK}}||14||3||3||8||10||16||-6|| {{#expr:3/14 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|THA}}||2||0||0||2||1||5||-4|| {{#expr:0/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|TKM}}||4||1||1||2||3||7||-4|| {{#expr:1/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|UAE}}||4||0||1||3||3||8||-5|| rowspan="2" | {{#expr:0/4 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|UZB}}||12||0||0||12||7||43||-36
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|VIE}}||1||1||0||0||2||1||+1|| {{#expr:1/1 * 100 round 2}}
|-
| style="text-align:left;"|{{fb|YEM}}||2||1||0||1||3||2||+1|| {{#expr:1/2 * 100 round 2}}
|-
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total ||166||48||27||91||185||292||–108|| {{#expr:48/166 * 100 round 2}}
|}

==Honours==
===Friendly===
*'''Aceh World Solidarity Cup (1)''': 2017
*'''[[2021 Three Nations Cup (Kyrgyzstan)|Three Nations Cup]] (1)''': 2021

== References ==
{{Reflist}}

== External links ==
{{Commons category}}
* [https://www.kfu.kg/ Kyrgyz FA] {{in lang|ky|ru}}
* [https://www.the-afc.com/en/central/kyrgyz_republic.html Kyrgyz Republic] at [[Asian Football Confederation|AFC]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/KGZ Kyrgyz Republic] at [[FIFA]]

{{Kyrgyzstan national football team}}
{{Navboxes
| title = Links to related articles
| titlestyle = background: red; color: yellow; border: 1px solid yellow;
| list  =
{{Kyrgyzstan national football team managers}}
{{Football in Kyrgyzstan}}
{{AFC teams}}
{{National sports teams of Kyrgyzstan}}
}}
{{Portal bar|Association football}}
{{Authority control}}

[[Category:Kyrgyzstan national football team| ]]
[[Category:Kyrgyzstan men's national football teams| ]]
[[Category:Asian national association football teams]]
